blocks.text: Leknessund Leads Norway Into Tirreno — Champions League Nights Beckon

Monday belongs to the roads of Italy, where two Norwegian riders chase early-season glory at Tirreno-Adriatico. Come Tuesday, Europe's elite collide in Champions League first legs with serious knockout stakes.
🚴 Tirreno-Adriatico 2026 Stage 1 kicks off — Leknessund & Wærenskjold as Norwegian spearheads across seven Italian stages
🎾 ATP/WTA Austin 125 2 — Early morning action on the hardcourts of Texas
